0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Backups"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Protect your agent's memory with reliable backup and restore procedures."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"SQLite Backup"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite databases are single files — backup is as simple as copying:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Hot backup (SQLite supports concurrent reads)\ncp mnemosyne.db mnemosyne-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d).db\n\n# With verification\nsqlite3 mnemosyne.db \".backup to mnemosyne-backup.db\"\nsqlite3 mnemosyne-backup.db \"PRAGMA integrity_check\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Automated Backups"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Using Litestream"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Install\nwget https://github.com/benbjohnson/litestream/releases/latest/download/litestream-linux-amd64.deb\nsudo dpkg -i litestream-linux-amd64.deb\n\n# Configure /etc/litestream.yml\naccess-key-id: AKIA...\nsecret-access-key: ...\n\ndbs:\n- path: /data/mnemosyne.db\n  replicas:\n    - url: s3://mybucket/mnemosyne\n      retention: 720h  # 30 days\n      snapshot-interval: 24h\n\n# Start\nsudo systemctl enable litestream\nsudo systemctl start litestream\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Using Cron"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Daily backup to S3\n0 3 * * * sqlite3 /data/mnemosyne.db \".backup to /tmp/mnemosyne-tmp.db\" && aws s3 cp /tmp/mnemosyne-tmp.db s3://backups/mnemosyne-$(date +%Y%m%d).db\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Restore"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# From file copy\ncp mnemosyne-backup-20260425.db mnemosyne.db\n\n# From Litestream\nlitestream restore -o mnemosyne.db s3://mybucket/mnemosyne\n\n# Verify\nsqlite3 mnemosyne.db \"PRAGMA integrity_check\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Backup Verification"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Always verify backups:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"#!/bin/bash\nBACKUP_FILE=$1\n\n# Check file exists and is valid SQLite\nif ! sqlite3 \"$BACKUP_FILE\" \"PRAGMA integrity_check;\" | grep -q \"ok\"; then\n  echo \"BACKUP FAILED: integrity check failed\"\n  exit 1\nfi\n\n# Check row counts\nWORKING=$(sqlite3 \"$BACKUP_FILE\" \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM working_memory;\")\nEPISODIC=$(sqlite3 \"$BACKUP_FILE\" \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM episodic_memory;\")\n\necho \"Backup verified: $WORKING working, $EPISODIC episodic\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Retention Policy"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Backup Type | Frequency | Retention |\n|-------------|-----------|-----------|\n| Hourly | Every hour | 24 hours |\n| Daily | Every day | 30 days |\n| Weekly | Every week | 12 weeks |\n| Monthly | Every month | 12 months |"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12","y1":"8","y2":"12","key":"1pkeuh"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12.01","y1":"16","y2":"16","key":"4dfq90"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-alert Schedule monthly restore drills to a staging environment."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0nuipubmwenwa.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/113wy2s~ukj5p.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0se1rt9lzyib_.js","async":true}],"$L4","$L5","$L6"],"$L7"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"oLBkLcipfllBBS_uEwuBd"}
